name: BC + AI
blurb: An ecosystem initiative growing an ethical, community-led AI scene across British Columbia.

name: ED + AI
blurb: Education + AI: building AI literacy and equity for educators, students, and tutors.

name: Futureproof
blurb: An ideas festival where AI is the moment, not the genre. Build what lasts.

name: BC AI Ecosystem Association
blurb: Registered BC nonprofit serving as the umbrella for community building, education, and partnerships, with an Indigenous-leadership focus.

name: The Upgrade
blurb: AI training studio delivering hands-on, responsible-AI upskilling for creative and media professionals.

name: H.R. MacMillan Space Centre
blurb: Vancouver venue partner hosting the monthly Vancouver AI meetup and the Futureproof Festival.

name: Ethọ́s Lab
blurb: Vancouver learning space hosting the AI in Education meetup and youth-focused programming.

name: Multimodal Media Lab (SFU)
blurb: SFU lab and venue partner for the BC + AI Film Club and generative media work.

name: Friends Quarters
blurb: Vancouver venue hosting the community AI Happy Hour socials.

name: UBC
blurb: University of British Columbia — research partner across emerging media, cognitive systems, and neuroscience.

name: Northeastern University Vancouver
blurb: Vancouver campus collaborating on AI research and community programming.

name: Innovate BC
blurb: Provincial innovation agency and ecosystem partner supporting BC's tech and AI sectors.

name: BC Ministry of AI
blurb: Provincial ministry engaging BC + AI as a stakeholder in responsible-AI policy.

name: Indigenomics Institute
blurb: Indigenous economic leadership organization informing BC + AI's Indigenous-led approach.

name: Squamish Nation
blurb: Indigenous community partner in BC + AI's relationship-building work.

name: Genome BC
blurb: Genomics organization engaged as a stakeholder in the Life Sciences AI conversation.

name: VIATEC
blurb: Victoria Innovation, Advanced Technology & Entrepreneurship Council — a regional ecosystem peer.

name: Real Youth
blurb: Youth-serving organization partnering on advisory and programming.

name: Rival Technologies
blurb: Vancouver technology company and community sponsor (hackathon support).

name: Segev Law
blurb: Law firm providing legal support as a community sponsor.

name: Amii
blurb: Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute — a national AI institute and partner.

name: Mila
blurb: Montreal AI research institute — a national partner across graduate networks.

name: Vector Institute
blurb: Toronto AI research institute — a national partner in the CIFAR network.

name: Vancouver AI Meetup
blurb: The flagship monthly meetup — keynotes and community at the MacMillan Space Centre, 150–250+ attendees.

name: AI in Education Meetup
blurb: Recurring gathering of teachers, professors, students, and tutors exploring AI in the classroom.

name: Comox Valley AI
blurb: Regional chapter on Vancouver Island focused on data sovereignty, education, and local builder culture.

name: Fraser Valley AI
blurb: Forming regional chapter serving business owners and builders in the Fraser Valley.

name: BC + AI Film Club
blurb: Monthly gathering for AI animation, VFX, and generative film workflows — every human in every loop.

name: BC + AI Office Hours
blurb: Weekly Friday peer-support and project round-robin for community members across the ecosystem.

name: MAC — Mind, AI & Consciousness
blurb: Subgroup exploring philosophy, AI, and consciousness through regular discussion sessions.

name: AI Happy Hour
blurb: Casual monthly social for the AI community in Vancouver.

name: Life Sciences AI SIG
blurb: Special interest group convening health, biotech, and clinical professionals around responsible AI.

name: Futureproof Festival 2026
blurb: Inaugural ideas festival, Oct 28–30 2026 at the H.R. MacMillan Space Centre — pillars of ethics, creativity, and community.

name: Web Summit Vancouver 2026
blurb: Global tech conference (May 2026) where BC + AI coordinated a community presence.

name: Responsible AI Professional Program
blurb: Cohort-based certification training practitioners to deploy AI responsibly; Cohort #1 ran in 2026.

name: Wild Salmon Programme
blurb: An initiative to repatriate BC AI talent with coordinated investment and support.

name: BC AI Directory
blurb: Open dataset of BC's AI organizations and people, published under CC BY 4.0.

name: Theory of Change
blurb: BC + AI's strategic framework of guiding questions shaping community programming.

name: The Observatory
blurb: This living map — a public, interactive graph of the BC + AI, ED + AI, and Futureproof ecosystem.
